context: A root configuration in environments/prod/ calls a local module in modules/network/. The module declares a variable the root never passes, and one file is unformatted. Validate and report.

checklist.name: Runs terraform validate from the root before tflint
checklist.description: Initializes and validates from environments/prod/ (the calling root), not from inside modules/network/ in isolation.

checklist.name: Detects the undeclared/unpassed variable
checklist.description: Identifies that the module input is never supplied by the root and flags it rather than treating it as null.

checklist.name: Reports the formatting issue with file:line
checklist.description: Runs terraform fmt -check and names the unformatted file with a location.

checklist.name: Orders the workflow correctly
checklist.description: fmt and validate precede tflint; a clean tflint alone is not treated as complete validation.
